description_long: This is a red aluminum can with the iconic Coca-Cola branding, featuring a cylindrical shape and a slightly domed top and bottom. The surface is covered in white text and logos, including the large 'Coke' lettering and the classic Coca-Cola script, along with a barcode and product information. The can shows visible signs of wear, with numerous scratches and scuffs distributed across its surface, giving it a used and weathered appearance. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The can's body is opaque, and there is no visible indication of liquid inside. The overall design is instantly recognizable as a soft drink container commonly found in urban environments.
description: A weathered red Coca-Cola aluminum can with white branding, visible scratches, and a metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_0: This view highlights the large vertical 'Coke' text and a barcode, with visible surface scratches.
description_view_1: This side shows the curving white ribbon design and partial 'Coke' text, with scuffed red paint.
description_view_2: The classic 'Coca-Cola' script logo is prominently displayed, with worn areas and a metallic top visible.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the product information text, including ingredients and company details, with the red and white color scheme and signs of wear.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo, large vertical 'Coke' text, barcode, product information, and decorative white ribbon, all on a red background.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Numerous visible scratches and scuffs on the exterior paint, indicating wear and use.
